events.text: Wrote the compliance assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Based on the evidence — closeout photos matching the referenced detail, visible clearances/labels/supports, proper terminations, and a clean inspection card — the work **passes** at low risk, with a note to verify torque and conductor/terminal temperature compatibility (NEC 110.14) before final energization.
